cases.name: 制造任务列表打开和基础查询
cases.evidence: Browser page smoke passed. Production action discovery captured list query POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/makeTaskList-pending with pageNo/pageSize payload and no visible/network/console/page errors. Runtime metadata maps WOM_1.0.0_produceTask_ProduceTask to WOM_PRODUCE_TASKS and pending filtering to wfm_task_pending. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-final8-20260615204438/production-action-discovery.json
cases.nextAction: Trace makeTaskList-pending handler and confirm read SQL shape against WOM_PRODUCE_TASKS and wfm_task_pending.

cases.name: 新建生产工单或制造任务
apiEndpoints: POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/makeTaskList-pending (query only; no create endpoint observed)
cases.evidence: Real browser discovery opened WOM makeTaskList and captured visible buttons: 查询, 仅查待办, 清空. Runtime view JSON for WOM_1.0.0_produceTask_makeTaskList has layoutDatagrid.buttons=[]. No safe 新增/新建/添加/创建 button was present, and no create endpoint was observed. Read model identifies WOM_PRODUCE_TASKS, but create write table is not accepted until a create route is found. Screenshot: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-202606151930/wom-make-task-list.png. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-final8-20260615204438/production-action-discovery.json
issues: Current WOM makeTaskList route appears to be a pending-task/list page, not the create entry for production work orders.
Runtime compatibility view for WOM_1.0.0_produceTask_makeTaskList exposes no grid buttons, so the current rendered page cannot initiate create.
Need to locate the real manufacturing order/task creation page, menu permission, or button authority source before marker-based create can run.
Need target table and required field mapping after create route is found.
cases.nextAction: Search menu/runtime metadata for produceTask create routes and button permissions; verify whether admin lacks create authority or the create flow lives in another page.

cases.name: 工单下发、暂停、恢复、关闭
cases.evidence: WOM 6.1.3.4 source customEvent.js defines startTaskEvent/pauseTaskEvent/recoveryTaskEvent calling POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/updateTaskState, and WOMProduceTaskController.updateTaskState delegates to WOMProduceTaskServiceImpl.updateTaskState. Real browser discovery still shows current makeTaskList only exposes 查询/仅查待办/清空 because runtime layoutDatagrid.buttons is empty; no marker state transition was executed.
issues: Current runtime makeTaskList does not expose the source-defined state transition buttons.
Need marker production task with valid status/taskRunState preconditions before executing state transition.
No PostgreSQL before/after field verification has been executed yet.
cases.nextAction: Restore WOM makeTaskList action buttons or RBAC button authority, then use a marker work order and verify WOM_PRODUCE_TASKS/TASK_RUN_STATE plus process/activity state fields before and after each transition.

cases.name: 工序报工、产量、不良数登记
cases.evidence: WOM 6.1.3.4 source maps report-work and activity execution through stopTaskEvent/addOutputByOutPutDetails, easyTaskOperateView/reportEvent/endEasyActive, and makeTaskView/makeTaskBatchView startActive/endActive. Runtime JSON patch fixed backend layoutJson 500 for makeTaskView, makeTaskBatchView, and easyTaskOperateView: layoutJson now returns 200. Real browser probing still shows the action pages fail in the desktop renderer with visible 出错了 banner and React error #130, with zero fields/buttons and no write requests. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-final8-20260615204438/production-action-discovery.json; direct layoutJson verification returned 200 with pageType EDIT/VIEW for the action viewCodes
issues: Report-work source routes and endpoints are identified, and layoutJson 500 is fixed, but the generated action-view component tree still crashes the desktop renderer with React #130.
No marker report-work action has been submitted through the real frontend.
Need PostgreSQL verification for WOM_PROC_REPORTS and related task/process/activity state fields after action view component metadata is recovered.
cases.nextAction: Recover the real desktop edit/view component metadata for makeTaskView/makeTaskBatchView/easyTaskOperateView, then seed a marker task/process/activity, execute report-work from the frontend, and query WOM_PROC_REPORTS plus state fields.
